title: Word Frequency Counter
description: Build a tool that counts word frequencies in text. Practice HashMaps, iterators, and string processing.

steps.title: Count words with HashMap
steps.instructions: Write a function that takes a &str and returns a HashMap<String, usize> with word frequencies. Normalize to lowercase and strip punctuation.

steps.title: Sort by frequency
steps.instructions: Write a function that takes the word frequency map and returns a Vec of (word, count) pairs sorted by count (descending), then alphabetically for ties.

steps.title: Display results
steps.instructions: Write a main function that processes a sample text and displays the top 10 most frequent words with a bar chart using '#' characters.
